title: Structureful
description: An structure mod with new useful items, blocks and armor
body:
### About

Structureful is a mod that add new structures in Overworld, Nether and End with custom items, blocks, and other useful things.

![End Laboratory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/77QJli8N/images/85798877215945057372303a16ae320c13c811f0.png)

-------------------------------------------------------------
### Content

For now mod have 2 strucutres!

> Meteorite with advanced Furnace.

> Volcano with blaze staff.

> End Laboratory with Dragon Heart.

Screenshots available.

-------------------------------------------------------------
### Credits

- [Rezolv](https://modrinth.com/user/Rezolv): artist
- Dragon Heart texture was taken from [Malcolm Riley's Unused Textures](https://github.com/malcolmriley/unused-textures)
